# terrible_community_general_swdepot (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Package name.
- `state` (String) Whether to install (`present`, `latest`), or remove (`absent`) a package.

### Optional

- `depot` (String) The source repository from which install or upgrade a package.
